user_outcome: One sentence: the single user-reachable outcome this slice delivers.
rationale: Optional human-authored prose explaining the slice. Never machine-parsed.
in_scope: Bullet-level statement of what this slice includes.
out_of_scope: Adjacent work this slice deliberately does not do.

risks.mitigation: The binding mitigation the implementer must follow.

acceptance_criteria.text: WHEN <user gesture at the entry point> THE SYSTEM SHALL <observable result>
